“Can I Do It Again?”: Ishan Kishan Comeback Before T20 World Cup

“Can I Do It Again?”: Ishan Kishan Comeback Before T20 World Cup

Ishan Kishan’s comeback became the biggest talking point after the Indian wicketkeeper-batter produced a breathtaking knock against New Zealand in the second T20I.

Smashing 76 runs off just 32 balls, Kishan repaid the selectors’ faith with a match-winning performance, firmly re-establishing his credentials ahead of the T20 World Cup 2026. Fans and pundits alike praised his aggressive strokeplay and composure under pressure.
